compiled_state.title: GREEN: Implement AcliClient.get_issue_link_types()

compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Implement AcliClient.get_issue_link_types() as an instance method on the AcliClient class in acli-integration.py. This method wraps the ACLI Go binary to query Jira's available issue link types via GET /rest/api/3/issueLinkType equivalent.

## Implementation Details
- Add get_issue_link_types() method to AcliClient class
- Use ACLI Go command: jira workitem link type list --json (or equivalent)
- Parse ACLI output JSON into list of dicts with id and name fields
- Follow existing AcliClient method patterns (use self._run(), raise on error)

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/acli-integration.py (Edit: add get_issue_link_types method to AcliClient)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] AcliClient has get_issue_link_types() instance method
  Verify: grep -q "def get_issue_link_types" plugins/dso/scripts/acli-integration.py
- [ ] RED tests from task 25e0-8005 now pass
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py -k "get_issue_link_types" --tb=short -q
